section_name: Standards for approval of evaluation center.
text: The State Board of Health shall adopt by regulation the standards to be used for approving the operation of a facility as an evaluation center for the purposes of NRS 484C.310 to 484C.360 , inclusive.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484C
##### § 484C.310 — Standards for approval of evaluation center.

The State Board of Health shall adopt by regulation the standards to be used for approving the operation of a facility as an evaluation center for the purposes of NRS 484C.310 to 484C.360 , inclusive.

subsections.text: The State Board of Health shall adopt by regulation the standards to be used for approving the operation of a facility as an evaluation center for the purposes of NRS 484C.310 to 484C.360 , inclusive.
